title: Assistant Manager - Electrical/ Mechanical (Data Centre)
description:
• Client side opportunity (Data center developer in APAC)
  • Greenfield projects across SEA region

About Our Client

My client is a privately owned data centre developer and operator that follows an owner-operator model, they design, build, commission, and operate their own facilities rather than just consulting or leasing space.

They're known for high technical standards, lean teams with real ownership, and a strong focus on mission-critical, hyperscale-ready infrastructure across the Asia-Pacific region.

Job Description

  • Support the Project Manager or Site Delivery Manager throughout the data centre design and construction phases, including site coordination and quality assurance.
  • Conduct regular site inspections to ensure construction works are delivered in compliance with internal standards and specifications.
  • Review and endorse design consultants' submissions, ensuring designs are fully developed and supported by appropriate engineering calculations.
  • Act as the key point of contact with design consultants to track progress and ensure timely delivery of all required design outputs.
  • Uphold internal engineering standards, with particular emphasis on MEP/ HVAC/plumbing systems.
  • Provide support during commissioning, testing, and final project handover stages.
  • Contribute to internal engineering design development and continuous improvement initiatives.
  • Assist in developing engineering and operational procedures in line with company standards.

The Successful Applicant

  • 6 years+ of experience in building services design and construction project delivery (data centre experience)
  • Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering or Building Services Engineering.
  • Self-motivated, proactive, detail-oriented, adaptable, and able to work well in a team-oriented environment.

What's on Offer

  • Greenfield DC project exposure
  • A highly stable and well-established data centre developer across APAC

Contact
